Matcha: Matching Programs

# Matcha: Matching Programs

## Activate 1:1 Chats in Your Community

104 followers

## Activate 1:1 Chats in Your Community

104 followers

Visit website

Team collaboration software

•

Professional networking platforms

•

Community management

Easy-to-create 1:1 matching programs for any community. Connect members based on interest, experience, location – or any criteria you choose. Then sit back and let Matcha do the work, with built-in scheduling, video chat, prompts, and analytics.

Reviews

No reviews yetBe the first to leave a review for Matcha: Matching Programs

Viktor.com [...] - PMM Camp (pmmcamp.com) uses it to reach an audience of PMMs and increase their newsletter and paid members - MarketingOps (marketingops.com) uses it as a value add for their paid members - Wednesday Women (wednesdaywomen.org) uses it to connect like-minded execs in a non-Slack, easy to engage way. How is it different from other matching programs? 🎈 It’s silly easy to get started and set up. You can build a program on our Free plan for up to 50 active participants. And the setup only takes minutes. 🎯 You get to choose the criteria your members are matched on and how they get matched. Connect people based on general parameters – or their answers to your custom questions. Set up a round-robin style – or more complex matching algorithms. 🤖 It’s all integrated. From matching, to scheduling [...] – and go even lower as your group grows larger. Start a matching program for FREE up to 50 active participants and unlock value as you grow. Enjoy Matcha programs? We’ve got even more rolling out soon for individuals… Follow along on LinkedIn, YouTube, and here on Product Hunt.

results.title: Clera: An AI agent matching candidates to the right roles. | Product Hunt
results.content:
Benedict Wolters
Clera

Clera

@luigi\_pastore Love to hear it! Just looked into it and yes, all seems to work smoothly:) Wishing you all the best and truly appreciate the feedback ideas you told our agent!

Marcus Larsson

Sounds really interesting! How do you make the intros after I've shown interest in a company? Also curious if Clera helps tailor the pitch for me before the intro, or if it's a direct connection to the hiring manager?

Alexander Farr
Clera

Clera

@marcus\_larsson1 good questions! The flow typically is like this:

We show jobs that we have data that you have good chances of landing an interview and is interesting to you

We share your profile to the company via our dashboard and Slack / Mail

Once they opt-in, we make direct intros [...] Alexander Farr
Clera

Clera

@avrisimon thanks so much for the thoughtful comments.

Actually, this is our secret sauce - getting more data from companies on what they really care about and which hires were successful for them in the past. Happy to chat more

results.title: EasyCode: Build serious apps with AI. 10x credits. No code required
results.content:
Youssef Abdelwahed
Leavoo

Leavoo

Hey team, Thanks for sharing that. You mentioned that you better than other tools, since other tools would produce a lot of errors, etc. Could you briefly mention how you approach that kind of issues differently in your case? (hence producing better results)

James Jiang
EasyCode

EasyCode

@youssef\_abdelwahed Thanks for the thoughtful question!

Great point — many tools can generate code quickly, but often at the cost of accuracy, which leads to frustrating errors. Our approach is different in a few ways:

Context-aware workflow – Instead of just generating snippets, we guide users through a structured flow that keeps track of the app’s state (frontend, backend, database, auth). This helps prevent mismatches that usually cause errors. [...] EasyCode

results.title: Databox: AI-powered analytics for teams that need answers now. | Product Hunt
results.content:
Jason Howie
Wannabe Stark

Wannabe Stark

@pc4media Great launch Peter! Love all of the free tools you and your team offer! Keep it up!

Rohan Chaubey

@pc4media Many congratulations Davorin, Ziga and team on shipping yet again! :)

I’m excited to be hunting Databox once again today after their previous launches Custom Integrations by Databox, Genie by Databox and Databox MCP.

The Databox Skills Marketplace is a free library of AI analytics skills that turn your live business

data into finished reports - in under a minute.

Why I hunted and endorse it? Every other AI tool makes you bring the data. Skills connect directly to [...] Gwendolyn Kira

I have tried a few analytics AI tools before, but many still expect me to figure out the right prompts. I like that your approach starts with proven workflows instead. That feels like a more natural way for teams to adopt AI without a lot of trial and error.

Ziga Potocnik
Databox

Databox

@gwendolyn\_kira That's the gap we were trying to close. Most AI analytics tools put the burden on you to know what to ask for, which assumes you're already the expert. Skills flip that - the expertise is baked into the file, so you start from a proven structure instead of a blank prompt and trial and error. Glad that distinction came through. [...] 8

24

## Forum Threads

Databox
Ziga Potocnik

2d ago

### We finished #2 Product of the Day - thank you! 🎉

Skills Marketplace by Databox launched yesterday (June 30th), and the community pushed it to #2 Product of the Day. Thank you.

13

92

Databox
Ziga Potocnik

3d ago

### We just launched Skills Marketplace by Databox - 25+ free AI analytics skills, live now.

It's Monday morning. You need the GA4 numbers for the team standup, so you export a CSV, upload it to your AI tool of choice, and start typing context it doesn't have - what's a good conversion rate for you, which channels actually matter, what "normal" looks like for your traffic.

We just made that whole loop unnecessary.
